title: crotalaria nana var. umbellata
intro: Crotalaria nana var. umbellata, also known as dwarf crotalaria or small rattlebox, is a small shrub-like plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria nana var. umbellata is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of ointments and creams for topical applications.
